shared-build.prompt: Phase 1, no dependencies. Review and fix any issues in packages/shared/src/ (constants.ts, types.ts, schemas.ts, clickhouse-ddl.ts, postgres-ddl.ts, index.ts). Create packages/shared/src/__tests__/schemas.test.ts — test all Zod schemas with valid and invalid inputs, especially trackerEventSchema and eventBatchSchema edge cases. Create packages/shared/src/__tests__/ddl.test.ts — assert all DDL strings are non-empty, contain expected table/view names. Verify all types are re-exported from index.ts. Run: pnpm --filter @analytics-platform/shared build && pnpm --filter @analytics-platform/shared test. Acceptance: build passes, all tests pass.

tracker-core.description: Implement core tracker — pageviews, clicks, scroll, batching
tracker-core.prompt: Phase 1, depends on shared-build. Create packages/tracker/src/tracker.ts — main AnalyticsTracker class. init() creates singleton, auto-tracks pageviews on popstate/pushState (monkey-patch history.pushState and history.replaceState), registers click listener, generates sessionId via crypto.randomUUID(), determines deviceType from viewport width using DEVICE_BREAKPOINTS from shared. Create packages/tracker/src/session.ts — session management: create sessionId, store in sessionStorage under key 'ap_session_id', detect new sessions (30min inactivity timeout via SESSION_TIMEOUT_MS), fire session_start/session_end events. Create packages/tracker/src/batch.ts — event queue with flush interval (default 5s from FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS) and max batch size (MAX_BATCH_SIZE). Uses navigator.sendBeacon for flush-on-unload, falls back to fetch with keepalive:true. Retry with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, max 3 retries). Create packages/tracker/src/device.ts — getDeviceType(width) using DEVICE_BREAKPOINTS, screen dimensions. Create packages/tracker/src/listeners.ts — pageview listener (History API patches + popstate), click listener (capture x, y, CSS selector chain), scroll depth tracker. Update packages/tracker/src/index.ts to wire everything together. Create packages/tracker/src/__tests__/batch.test.ts and __tests__/session.test.ts. Acceptance: pnpm --filter @marlinjai/analytics-tracker build produces dist/ <5KB gzip; unit tests pass; no runtime dependencies.

tracker-replay.description: Add optional rrweb session replay recording
tracker-replay.prompt: Phase 1, depends on tracker-core. Create packages/tracker/src/replay.ts — lazy-loads rrweb via dynamic import('rrweb') only when config.replay === true. Chunks rrweb events into replay_chunk TrackerEvent payloads. Each chunk is an array of rrweb event objects. Flush chunks every 10 seconds. Max chunk size: MAX_REPLAY_CHUNK_BYTES (512KB) from shared constants. If rrweb is not installed, gracefully no-op (catch import error, log warning in debug mode). Update packages/tracker/src/index.ts — call replay init if config.replay is true. Create packages/tracker/src/__tests__/replay.test.ts. Acceptance: build still <5KB gzip (rrweb not bundled, only dynamic import); replay module gracefully no-ops if rrweb not installed; chunk splitting works for large recordings.

api-ingestion.prompt: Phase 1, depends on shared-build. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/collect/route.ts — Next.js route handler for POST /api/collect. Validates request body with eventBatchSchema from @analytics-platform/shared. Authenticates via x-api-key header — looks up key prefix in Postgres api_keys table, compares SHA-256 hash. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/clickhouse.ts — ClickHouse client using @clickhouse/client, reads CLICKHOUSE_URL, CLICKHOUSE_USER, CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD from env. Batch insert into analytics.events table. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/enrich.ts — enriches events: ipHash (SHA-256 of x-forwarded-for or request IP + daily salt), country (stub returning empty string for now), receivedAt timestamp. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/api-key.ts — API key validation: parse prefix (ap_live_/ap_test_), SHA-256 hash the full key, query Postgres for matching hash + non-revoked. Validates projectId in events matches the API key's project. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/db.ts — Postgres client using postgres (porsager) package. Response: { ok: true, accepted: number, dropped: number } (200) or { error: string } (4xx). Rate limit: 100 requests/min per API key (in-memory Map with sliding window). Add @clickhouse/client and postgres to dashboard package.json. Acceptance: valid batches return 200 and insert into ClickHouse; invalid payloads return 400 with Zod errors; invalid/revoked API keys return 401.

api-queries.description: Implement stats, heatmap, sessions, and replay query routes
api-queries.prompt: Phase 2, depends on api-ingestion. All routes require authenticated NextAuth session + project membership check. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/stats/route.ts — GET, validates with statsQuerySchema, returns StatsOverview + TimeseriesPoint[]. Queries pageviews_hourly_mv. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/stats/pages/route.ts — GET, returns TopPage[] from pageviews_hourly_mv aggregated by URL. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/heatmap/route.ts — GET, validates with heatmapQuerySchema, returns HeatmapPoint[] from heatmap_clicks_mv. 10px bucketed coordinates. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/sessions/route.ts — GET, validates with sessionListQuerySchema, returns paginated SessionSummary[] from sessions_summary_mv with cursor-based pagination. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/sessions/[sessionId]/replay/route.ts — GET, validates with replayQuerySchema, returns ordered array of rrweb event chunks from events table where type='replay_chunk'. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/queries/stats.ts, heatmap.ts, sessions.ts — ClickHouse query builders. Use materialized views for performance. Acceptance: each route returns correct response types; date range filtering works; cursor pagination for sessions works.

api-projects.description: Implement project + API key CRUD routes
api-projects.prompt: Phase 2, depends on shared-build. All routes protected by NextAuth session (not API key). Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/projects/route.ts — GET (list user's projects via memberships), POST (create project, validates with createProjectSchema, auto-creates owner membership). Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/projects/[projectId]/route.ts — GET, PUT, DELETE. Ownership check via memberships (owner/admin only for mutations). Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/projects/[projectId]/keys/route.ts — GET (list keys for project, mask full key), POST (create key, validates with createApiKeySchema). Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/projects/[projectId]/keys/[keyId]/route.ts — DELETE (soft revoke, sets revoked_at). Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/crypto.ts — generateApiKey() returns { fullKey, keyHash, prefix }. Format: ap_live_ or ap_test_ + 32 random hex chars. Hash with SHA-256. Only the hash stored in Postgres; full key returned only on creation. Acceptance: full CRUD works; API key shown only once on creation; role-based access enforced.

dashboard-auth.prompt: Phase 2, needs Postgres running. Create packages/dashboard/src/lib/auth.ts — NextAuth v5 config with Postgres adapter. Providers: GitHub OAuth (GITHUB_ID, GITHUB_SECRET env vars) + Credentials (email/password for dev, bcrypt hashing). Session strategy: JWT. Session includes userId for membership lookups. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts — NextAuth route handler. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/login/page.tsx — login page with GitHub OAuth button + email/password form. Dark theme matching globals.css. Create packages/dashboard/src/middleware.ts — protect all routes except /login, /api/collect, /api/auth/*, and static assets (_next). Redirect unauthenticated users to /login. Add next-auth, @auth/pg-adapter, bcrypt to dashboard dependencies. Acceptance: GitHub OAuth login works; credentials login works; unauthenticated users redirect to /login; /api/collect is NOT protected (uses API keys instead).

dashboard-overview.description: Build analytics overview page with charts
dashboard-overview.prompt: Phase 3, depends on api-queries + dashboard-auth. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx — dashboard layout with sidebar navigation (Overview, Heatmap, Replay, Settings). Create packages/dashboard/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx and ProjectSwitcher.tsx. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/page.tsx — analytics overview. Fetches from /api/stats and /api/stats/pages. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/charts/TimeseriesChart.tsx — pageviews + visitors line chart (use recharts). Create packages/dashboard/src/components/charts/StatsCards.tsx — 5 cards: pageviews, visitors, sessions, avg duration, bounce rate. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/charts/TopPagesTable.tsx — URL, views, visitors columns, sortable. Add date range picker component (7d, 30d, 90d, custom). Use React Server Components for data fetching, client components for interactive charts. Dark theme, Tailwind styling. Responsive layout (mobile sidebar collapses). Loading states and empty states. Add recharts to dashboard dependencies. Acceptance: overview renders with real data; date range changes refetch; responsive layout works.

dashboard-heatmap.prompt: Phase 3, depends on api-queries + dashboard-auth. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/heatmap/page.tsx — URL selector from tracked pages + device type filter + date range picker. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/heatmap/HeatmapOverlay.tsx — canvas-based heatmap rendering using heatmap.js (h337). Loads target URL in iframe, overlays canvas, feeds aggregated coordinate data to heatmap.js. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/heatmap/UrlSelector.tsx — dropdown of tracked URLs (from top pages API). Create packages/dashboard/src/components/heatmap/DeviceToggle.tsx — desktop/tablet/mobile toggle. Fetches from /api/heatmap. Canvas scales with iframe dimensions. Color gradient: cold blue to hot red. Gaussian blur for smooth heat blobs. Add heatmap.js to dashboard dependencies. Acceptance: heatmap renders correctly over iframe content; device filter changes data; color gradient represents click density; works for different viewport sizes.

dashboard-replay.prompt: Phase 3, depends on api-queries + dashboard-auth. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/replay/page.tsx — session list with filters (date range, device type). Paginated table from /api/sessions showing duration, pageviews, country, device. Create packages/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/replay/[sessionId]/page.tsx — replay player page. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/replay/SessionList.tsx — paginated session table with cursor-based pagination. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/replay/ReplayPlayer.tsx — wraps rrweb-player for playback. Fetches chunks from /api/sessions/{id}/replay. Create packages/dashboard/src/components/replay/ReplayTimeline.tsx — shows event markers (clicks, page navigations) on timeline. Playback controls: play/pause, speed (1x, 2x, 4x), skip inactivity. Add rrweb-player to dashboard dependencies. Acceptance: session list with pagination; replay plays back sessions smoothly; speed controls work; skip inactivity jumps to next action.
